title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three rules for building successfully with Claude Code, drawing from Y Combinator's CEO Garry Tan. The video includes guidance on what not to build versus what to build, plus six moves for becoming an AI team leader, structured around a four-question test before starting projects.
